requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Safety and Market Access — IEC 62109, ANGMV, Ministry of Energy, and Desert Heat
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器安全和市场准入——IEC 62109、ANGMV、能源部及沙漠高温
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器安全和市場准入——IEC 62109、ANGMV、能源部及沙漠高溫

summary.en: Djibouti's national standards and conformity assessment infrastructure for PV inverters appears comparatively weak and publicly documented requirements are limited. ANGMV, the Ministry of Energy, customs, EDD, donors, lenders, and project owners may therefore control the practical evidence package for imported PV inverters. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core international safety standards for PV power converters and inverters. For Djibouti, safety evidence should also address extreme desert heat, dust exposure, coastal corrosion near Doraleh and Djibouti port logistics, surge protection, service access, and thermal derating. Djibouti's role as a China-BRI logistics hub linked to Doraleh port and the Addis-Djibouti railway can make project documentation and customs coordination commercially important even where national PV standards are not mature.
summary.zh: 吉布提针对光伏逆变器的国家标准和合格评定基础设施相对薄弱，公开文件化要求有限。因此，ANGMV、能源部、海关、EDD、捐助方、贷款方和项目业主可能控制进口光伏逆变器的实际证据包。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率变换器及逆变器的核心国际安全标准。对于吉布提，安全证据还应覆盖极端沙漠高温、粉尘暴露、Doraleh及吉布提港物流附近的沿海腐蚀、浪涌保护、维护通道和热降额。吉布提作为连接Doraleh港和亚吉铁路的中国一带一路物流枢纽，即使国家光伏标准尚不成熟，项目文件和海关协调也可能具有商业重要性。
summary.zht: 吉布地針對光伏逆變器的國家標準和合格評定基礎設施相對薄弱，公開文件化要求有限。因此，ANGMV、能源部、海關、EDD、捐助方、貸款方和項目業主可能控制進口光伏逆變器的實際證據包。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率轉換器及逆變器的核心國際安全標準。對於吉布地，安全證據還應覆蓋極端沙漠高溫、粉塵暴露、Doraleh及吉布地港物流附近的沿海腐蝕、浪湧保護、維護通道和熱降額。吉布地作為連接Doraleh港和亞吉鐵路的中國一帶一路物流樞紐，即使國家光伏標準尚不成熟，項目文件和海關協調也可能具有商業重要性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
ANGMV or Djibouti standards and conformity requirements where applicable
Ministry of Energy, customs, EDD, donor, lender, EPC, or project-owner import and technical specifications where applicable

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety files commonly include GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory quality files, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents support China domestic acceptance but do not create automatic market access in Djibouti. GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 should be mapped clause by clause to IEC 62109-1/-2 and supplemented with accredited IEC reports for international project use.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂质量文件、CQC或CGC自愿认证证书及CNAS实验室报告。上述文件支持中国国内认可，但不会在吉布提自动形成市场准入。GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004应逐条映射至IEC 62109-1/-2，并为国际项目使用补充认可IEC报告。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠品質文件、CQC或CGC自願認證證書及CNAS實驗室報告。上述文件支持中國國內認可，但不會在吉布地自動形成市場准入。GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004應逐條映射至IEC 62109-1/-2，並為國際項目使用補充認可IEC報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification schemes where held

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic safety certificates are not an automatic substitute for IEC 62109 evidence or Djibouti project-owner acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or reports for the exact inverter model or family, a GB/T-to-IEC clause matrix, high-ambient thermal derating curves, enclosure IP and dust/corrosion evidence, surge-protection coordination, installation clearance requirements, and French or project-specified documentation where required. Because Djibouti is extremely hot and solar deployment is expanding alongside geothermal policy, verify inverter output derating, fan or cooling lifetime, capacitor temperature class, and warranty conditions at local ambient extremes before procurement.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内安全证书不能自动替代IEC 62109证据或吉布提项目业主认可。出口商应为准确的逆变器型号或系列准备IEC 62109-1/-2证书或报告、GB/T至IEC逐条矩阵、高温环境热降额曲线、外壳IP及粉尘/腐蚀证据、浪涌保护协调、安装间距要求，以及在需要时提供法语或项目指定文件。由于吉布提极端炎热，且太阳能部署与地热政策同步推进，采购前应核验逆变器在当地极端环境温度下的输出降额、风扇或冷却寿命、电容温度等级和保修条件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內安全證書不能自動替代IEC 62109證據或吉布地項目業主認可。出口商應為準確的逆變器型號或系列準備IEC 62109-1/-2證書或報告、GB/T至IEC逐條矩陣、高溫環境熱降額曲線、外殼IP及粉塵/腐蝕證據、浪湧保護協調、安裝間距要求，以及在需要時提供法語或項目指定文件。由於吉布地極端炎熱，且太陽能部署與地熱政策同步推進，採購前應核驗逆變器在當地極端環境溫度下的輸出降額、風扇或冷卻壽命、電容溫度等級和保固條件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; IEC 62109 evidence is mandatory in practice where required by EDD, ANGMV, the Ministry of Energy, customs, donors, lenders, EPCs, or project-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary under GB/T and CQC/CGC style China domestic PV inverter certification; not automatically accepted for Djibouti market access or project approval

source.publisher: Agence Nationale de la Metrologie et de la Verification (ANGMV), Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Djibouti PV inverter safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2 plus project-specific ANGMV, Ministry of Energy, customs, EDD, donor, lender, EPC, or owner requirements. Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 evidence is not automatically accepted. Extreme desert heat is a real engineering gap: document derating, cooling lifetime, enclosure protection, dust, corrosion, and surge-protection assumptions before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提光伏逆变器安全文件应围绕IEC 62109-1/-2以及ANGMV、能源部、海关、EDD、捐助方、贷款方、EPC或业主的项目专属要求建立。中国GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004证据不会被自动接受。极端沙漠高温是真实工程差距：出货前应记录降额、冷却寿命、外壳防护、粉尘、腐蚀和浪涌保护假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地光伏逆變器安全文件應圍繞IEC 62109-1/-2以及ANGMV、能源部、海關、EDD、捐助方、貸款方、EPC或業主的項目專屬要求建立。中國GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004證據不會被自動接受。極端沙漠高溫是真實工程差距：出貨前應記錄降額、冷卻壽命、外殼防護、粉塵、腐蝕和浪湧保護假設。
